$comment: LK11/CU6 cross-CU CALL (cycle 19: the first runnable multi-CU binary, pe64-only). c154 (D-LK11-ELF-MACHO-CROSSCU-THUNK-EMISSION): the elf x86_64 / elf aarch64(qemu) / macho arm64 exec arms join — the 2-TU build routes through the LK11 whole-program MIR merge (cross-CU calls become intra-module DIRECT calls; no assembled-tier thunk), so ONE image per format carries both TUs and exits 42 iff main.c's extern call bound to helper.c's add5. Witnessed end-to-end on WSL glibc (elf x86_64 exit 42) + natively on windows (pe exit 42); the macho arm runs on the darwin CI leg.
